  2. Devices

9 awesome original shows to watch on Amazon Kids+, the award-winning subscription service for kids

Amazon Kids+ delivers award-winning original shows alongside thousands of books, games, and videos children love.

    Written by Deb Landau

    4 min read

    Key takeaways

    • Amazon Kids+ provides children ages 3–12 with a digital space featuring thousands of kid-friendly shows, games, and books curated to be fun, educational, and age-appropriate.
    • The Parent Dashboard gives families control and visibility while kids enjoy content from brands like Disney and PBS Kids alongside Amazon Kids+ originals.
    • Original shows including Jim Henson’s Monster Dance, Angry Birds Mystery Island and Hello Kitty: Super Style! deliver entertainment that balances fun with learning.
    Amazon Kids+ is a digital subscription service where kids between ages 3 and 12 can safely watch and learn from fun and educational content of all kinds: TV shows, games, books, podcasts, Alexa Skills, and more. The service is a self-contained space with seemingly endless opportunities for kids to grow.

    What is Amazon Kids+? Here’s everything you need to know about the digital subscription service

    Learn about the incredible digital playground that let kids safely discover a treasure trove of shows, books, podcasts, games, and more.

    "The real magic of Amazon Kids+ is watching kids explore and find content they love on their own,” said Aaron Berman, head of Amazon Kids+ Original Shows. “We've built this safe space where they can follow their curiosity and discover new interests—it's like giving them their own digital playground with guardrails."
    Amazon Kids+ gives parents peace of mind knowing that all the entertainment is age-appropriate and ad-free.
    Berman said that the entire Amazon Kids+ catalog is curated with a focus on kids’ cognitive development. He also emphasized that Amazon Kids+ delivers more than just kid-centric content; the Parent Dashboard is full of features and tools that give parents control and visibility.
    "Everything we do is about creating and providing content that kids love and parents can feel good about,” said Berman. “The kids get to enjoy all their favorite shows and games, while parents get this amazing toolbox—the Parent Dashboard—that lets them shape their family's experience in a way that works best for them."
    Kids always have something to explore—whether it’s content from brands like Disney, LEGO, Nickelodeon, Marvel, and PBS Kids, or Amazon Kids+ original series.
    Here are nine of those original shows to check out now.

    Page overview

    Jim Henson’s Monster Dance

    1
    Jim Henson’s Monster Dance
    2
    BAT-FAM
    3
    Angry Birds Mystery Island
    4
    Surprise & Seek
    5
    Dino Dex
    6
    Hello Kitty: Super Style!
    7
    Blippi’s Treehouse
    8
    ARPO Robot Babysitter
    9
    Super Spy Ryan
    1.
    Jim Henson’s Monster Dance

    In Jim Henson's Monster Dance, kids are invited to let their inner monster out on the dance floor, expressing big emotions through physical movement. Carrying on Jim Henson's legacy of loveable monsters, the shorts feature a new cast of colorful animated characters – inspired by his original designs and brought to life by the award-winning Henson Digital Puppetry Studio.

    2.
    BAT-FAM

    BAT-FAM follows Batman, Alfred, and young Damian Wayne—now proudly calling himself "Little Batman"—in a hilarious and heartwarming series where superhero life meets family chaos. When Wayne Manor's doors open to welcome quirky new residents, this close-knit family of misfits navigates the fun and frustrations of ordinary life while protecting the streets of Gotham City.

    3.
    Angry Birds Mystery Island

    Angry Birds Mystery Island introduces three new Hatchling characters—Mia, Rosie, and Buddy—and a foreign exchange piglet named Hamylton. The gang receives an all-expenses-paid island getaway, when they are mistakenly catapulted onto an uncharted island. Left to explore the exotic sights, smells, and unexplained phenomena of their new environment without any adults around, the ragtag bunch quickly learns that, in order to survive and make it back home, they will need to unlock the mysteries of the island together.

    4.
    Surprise & Seek

    Welcome to Surprise & Seek, where we take your favorite game of hide and seek and invite friends to explore imaginative, immersive worlds: Dino Highlands, Candy Corner, Pirate Cove, Winter Wonderland, Fairytale Forest, and Play Park. Our seeker will have to race the clock...and surprises...a lot of surprises...as they try to find their five friends and win the golden spectacles.

    5.
    Dino Dex

    Dex is a nine-year-old artist, explorer, and "paleontologist in training." Like Dan, Trek, and his big sister Dana, Dex uses his Dino Field Guide to magically see and study dinosaurs in the real world. Thanks to his artistic eye, Dex envisions them a bit differently, getting right into the action to reconsider how prehistoric creatures like the T. rex, velociraptor, and megalodon looked and lived.

    6.
    Hello Kitty: Super Style!

    Hello Kitty, the beloved pop culture icon from Sanrio, makes her 3D debut as a stylish and courageously compassionate small-town hero. In this feel-good and fun series, Hello Kitty uses the power of her magical bow to help friends in need, by transforming into the perfect persona (such as chef, athlete, detective) to problem-solve and save the day.

    7.
    Blippi’s Treehouse

    Blippi and his friends Meekah, Scratch, and Patch go on curiosity journeys to discover different ways to engage with the world around them—whether it’s crafting a dinosaur’s spiky tail, reading about space, or singing and dancing to learn about nature. With surprise celebrity friends like singer-songwriter Jordin Sparks and international soccer star Javier 'Chicharito' Hernández stopping by, there’s always something fun happening at Blippi’s Treehouse. In addition, companion books and music videos are available on Amazon Kids+ to take kids’ learning to the next level.

    8.
    ARPO Robot Babysitter

    When superrobot ARPO is kicked out of the military, he receives his most important mission yet: taking care of a precocious baby named Cookie. In this hilarious and heartwarming animated series based on the popular YouTube show, ARPO and his ragtag robot sidekicks deploy high-tech gadgets and elaborate plans to tackle domestic chores from cleaning the house to changing dirty diapers.

    9.
    Super Spy Ryan

    In this action-packed special, kid video star Ryan Kaji is transported into an animated virtual reality where he and his cartoon pals must become the ultimate superspies. Their mission is to recover stolen birthday presents from the clutches of a nefarious yet goofy hamster named Pack Rat. And they’ll need a little help from Ryan’s family back in the real world to pull it off.

    Amazon Kids+ is available in Canada, Germany, Japan, the UK, and the U.S.; kids and families can use Amazon Kids+ across compatible Echo, Fire tablet, Fire TV, and Kindle devices.
    This story has been updated to include additional shows. It was first published in February 2023.
